nasb.text: They judged the people at all times; the difficult dispute they would bring to Moses, but every minor dispute they themselves would judge.

esv.text: And they judged the people at all times. Any hard case they brought to Moses, but any small matter they decided themselves.

cnv.text: 他們隨時審判人民的案件；有困難的事件，他們就帶到摩西那裡；所有小事件，由他們自己審判。

ccb.text: 他们负责随时审理百姓的事，遇到难断的案件就呈到摩西那里，自己则审理普通的事。
